main.description: A titled document whose body is Markdown by default, or raw HTML when `format` is `"html"`. One record lexicon among others — like any record, it can be carried by a frame; stored as an artifact it becomes that artifact's record.

format.description: How the body is rendered by a client. Absent or "markdown" => the body is Markdown; "html" => the body is raw HTML, rendered sanitized (no script execution). Opaque to the substrate; a client rendering concern only.
